resources:
Cancel Confirm Error Tip Warning Back Refresh Reset Delete Rename Copy Paste More Settings Expand Collapse Main Menu Download Done Close Clear Import Enable Disable Open in Browser Content cannot be empty! Invalid characters in name: \"%s\" Input cannot be parsed as a number Value cannot be smaller than %s Value cannot be larger than %s Text length: %1$d/%2$d Unpacking %s Unknown Follow the global setting Custom Search Loading In Progress Use Anyway Got it Ignore Authorization File Name: %s File Size: %s All Enabled Disabled Unspecified Save Saved Share Copied No matching items Follow System
Browse Folder Importing Files Are you sure you want to delete %s?
day MMM d, yyyy, h:mm:ss a just now %d minutes ago %d hours ago %d days ago %d months ago %d years ago %s
Sort By Sort by Name Sort by File Name Sort by Last Modified Sort by Last Played
You are using a test version of %s! This version may be unstable and is primarily intended for feature testing and early access. It is not recommended for long-term use! If you encounter any issues during testing, please report them to us via GitHub and we will address them as soon as possible. This warning cannot be dismissed
Dynamic (Android 12+) Embermire Velvet Rose Mistwave Glacier Verdant Twilight Urban Ash Silent Forest Dawn Color Picker Edit Hex Invalid Hex
Bounce Jelly Bounce Slice In
%s has encountered a fatal error The application crashed unexpectedly. The error details below will help developers improve the app. JVM exited with code %d. JVM aborted due to fatal signal %d. For details on the cause, please check the log file. If you are unable to resolve the issue yourself, please send the log file to someone who can analyze it. They may be able to help you diagnose and fix the problem. Please do not take a screenshot of the current screen, as screenshots may not provide sufficient information to resolve the issue. Crash Type: %s Launcher Crash Game Crash Share Logs Restart Exit Share Link The launcher will upload game logs to a public platform. You will receive a link that can be conveniently shared with others for diagnosis. Uploading logs to %s Upload Failed No available link found. Please try again later. App Launch Failed The launcher encountered a serious problem and crashed during startup
Failed to import image An error occurred while importing the file Failed to create directory: %s Request timed out Network unavailable Failed to connect to server Failed to parse data (%s) Unauthorized (%s) Resource not found (%s) Client error Unknown error: %s
The launcher needs to install these files to ensure Minecraft runs properly. They are included in the app and must be extracted first. Click the button below to start extraction and update. The launcher is extracting these files. Once done, it will automatically enter the main screen. Please wait patiently. Install
Check Notification Permission Request Permission To ensure a smooth installation, the launcher needs to run the installer in the foreground. We\'ll try to start a foreground service to maintain stability, but this requires notification permissions. Could you help us enable notification permissions? This will help prevent installation interruptions! Foreground Installation Service Installing the game via foreground service During multiplayer sessions, the launcher uses a foreground service to display the current connection status, so notification permission is required.
Check Microphone Input Volume: %d Microphone Permission Not Granted to Launcher
Java 8 Environment (required for Minecraft 1.16 and below) Java 17 Environment (required for Minecraft 1.17+) Java 21 Environment (required for Minecraft 1.20.5+) Modifies authlib for external logins Portable GUI backend for OpenJDK Lightweight Java Game Library (required by Minecraft) Essential launcher components
Launch Task Menu
Game Modpack Mod Resource Pack Saves Shader Pack Failed to get version: %s. Tap to retry. Release Snapshot April Fools Old Version Alpha Beta Version Name Failed to load list: %s Available Unavailable Incompatible with %s Compatible with %s Please select the %s version first Release Preview Stable Debug %s Recommended Not installable automatically %s is not selected. Without installing it, most mods will not work! Installing Game Downloading Vanilla %s Download %1$s %2$s main file Download %s main file Install %s Installing %s in the foreground Fetch download URL for OptiFine %s Analyze libraries for %s Preparing %s mapping file Install game files Install Installation Failed An exception occurred during the installation of your game: Unable to retrieve the download link for the main OptiFine file An exception occurred during installation, exit code: %s Some files failed to download, possibly due to network issues. Installation Successful Your game has been successfully installed! Clear cache files Waiting for user to enter version name Enter the pre-installed version name You are using mobile data. Continuing the download will consume data. Search Name Target Platform Game Version Category Mod Loader None Selected Relevance Total Downloads Popularity Recently Created Recently Updated By %s Previous Page Next Page Failed to get search results: %s. Tap to retry. Failed to retrieve project information: %s. Tap to retry. Failed to retrieve version list: %s. Tap to retry. Show Only MC Releases Search MC Versions Dependencies Optional Projects Starting to load paged data Paged data loaded, chunk %1$d, page %2$d Loading and caching dependency project, ID: %s Related Links Project Page View Source Code Report Issues View Wiki Stable Beta Alpha No available game version is currently installed, so the target download location for the asset cannot be determined. Please install a game version first! Install for which game versions? Downloading and installing assets\n%1$s\n (%2$s / %3$s) Installing assets\n%s Failed to install assets! Before installation, you need to understand that most modpacks are made for PC, and there\'s a high chance of crashes or other issues when you try to launch them. These problems are often beyond what the launcher can resolve. You will need to learn the relevant knowledge to try and resolve the issues yourself, or seek help from others. Note: The launcher developers typically do not handle issues caused by modpacks. Installing modpack Parse modpack Get mod download link (%1$d/%2$d) Extract modpack files Download required content for modpack Download all mods (%1$d/%2$d, %3$s) Retry downloading all mods (%1$d/%2$d, %3$s) Retrieve loader information Moving modpack files
World Generation Biomes Dimensions Ores & Resources Structures <string name="download_assets_category_t
